basic_details.job_title: JK Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 31 Anganwadi Workers, Anganwadi Helpers Posts

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: 10+2 for Anganwadi Workers, Matriculation for Anganwadi Helpers
qualification.details: Sanginis (Anganwadi Workers): 10+2 minimum and maximum Graduation Sahayikas (Anganwadi Helpers): Matriculation minimum or 8th standard

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Merit based on marks in qualifying examination Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICDS Jammu and Kashmir Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.jkicds.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 21-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download ICDS Jammu and Kashmir Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICDS Jammu and Kashmir Sanginis and Sahayikas posts?
faq.answer: The last date for the submission of applications is 21st July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the authorities before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: For Sanginis (Anganwadi Workers), a minimum of 10+2 qualification is required, with graduation being the maximum. For Sahayikas (Anganwadi Helpers), a minimum of Matriculation or 8th standard is necessary.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The age limit for all posts is between 18 years (minimum) and 37 years (maximum). Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How can candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the specified address before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for ICDS Jammu and Kashmir recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: A total of 31 vacancies are available for the posts of Sanginis and Sahayikas.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are there for Sanginis (Anganwadi Workers)?
faq.answer: There are 14 vacancies for the post of Sanginis (Anganwadi Workers).

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are there for Sahayikas (Anganwadi Helpers)?
faq.answer: There are 17 vacancies for the post of Sahayikas (Anganwadi Helpers).

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on merit determined by the marks obtained in the qualifying examination, followed by document verification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the links provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
